workflow-1774541229871-w50t4g.name: anvil-build-cycle
workflow-1774541229871-w50t4g.description: ANVIL build automation — reads FORGE blueprint, executes task, validates against spec, updates vault state. Respects Constitution: no scope expansion, no design decisions.

config.description: Read STATE.md, FORGE blueprint, BRAND-SPEC, and build log to understand current position
From build manifest, identify the next incomplete task with its done-gate criteria
Verify task is in FORGE scope. If out of scope, stop and notify SENTINEL.
Execute the identified task using appropriate Ruflo swarm agent
Run done-gate criteria: tests pass, blueprint compliance, brand spec compliance
Update STATE.md, build log, and sprint tracking with completed work
Check if more tasks remain. If yes, loop. If no, notify Casey: build complete.

workflow-1774541240128-u0bhtt.name: vault-state-sync
workflow-1774541240128-u0bhtt.description: Syncs Ruflo memory with Obsidian vault state. Reads STATE.md, updates Ruflo memory with current battle drill position, build progress, and blockers.

config.description: Read apex-os/00-system/SPRINT.md for current sprint status
Update Ruflo memory namespace apex-os with current vault state
If STATE.md last-updated is >48h old, flag as stale and notify

workflow-1774541252991-slfoy9.name: evolution-cycle
workflow-1774541252991-slfoy9.description: Weekly agent evolution cycle. Pulls trajectory data from Ruflo, scores each active agent against rubric, identifies patterns, proposes improvements. Routes to Casey for approval per Constitution Article III.

config.description: Pull all completed trajectories from the past week from Ruflo intelligence
Score each agent that had activity against their rubric criteria stored in agent-{name} namespace
Search for successful patterns (quality > 0.7) and anti-patterns (quality < 0.4) across all agents
For agents scoring below baseline, propose specific persona/rubric improvements with rollback plans
Write evolution report to apex-os/00-system/ and notify Casey for approval. No changes enacted without human initiation.
